app.name: BlockFlow
status.notStarted: Did not start: watcher condition is not true.
confirm.unverifiedWorkflow: This automation is imported or unverified. It is recommended to test it in dry-run first. Run anyway?
palette.chooseStarterHelp: For a new automation, choose a start block first: Start, Watcher trigger, Click trigger, or Scheduled start. Other blocks cannot be added until then.
palette.insertAfter: Clicking a new block inserts it after the selected block
palette.noSelection: No block selected: a new block is added to the end of the workflow. Select a block to insert after it.
block.trigger.name: Start
block.triggerGroup.name: Watcher trigger
block.triggerGroup.desc: Starter container: automatically starts the workflow based on conditions.
block.clickTrigger.name: Click trigger
block.clickTrigger.desc: Automatic starter: starts when the user clicks the selected element.
block.conditionText.name: Condition: text
block.conditionText.desc: True when the specified text or character appears on the page.
block.conditionElement.name: Condition: element
block.conditionElement.desc: True when the selected element is found on the page.
block.conditionField.name: Condition: field value
block.conditionField.desc: True when a field value matches the specified condition.
block.conditionUrl.name: Condition: URL
block.conditionUrl.desc: True when the current URL matches the specified condition.
block.conditionChange.name: Condition: value changes
block.conditionChange.desc: True when a field or text changes in the specified direction compared with the previous watcher check.
block.conditionGroup.name: Condition group
block.conditionGroup.desc: Logical group inside a watcher: all, any, or none of the conditions are true.
block.click.name: Click
block.fill.name: Paste / fill
block.fill.desc: Writes text into a field, including framework-compatible events.
block.selectOption.name: Select dropdown option
block.selectOption.desc: Opens a custom or modern dropdown and selects an option by text.
block.injectCss.name: Inject CSS
block.injectCss.desc: Inserts custom CSS rules into the current page or removes a previously injected style.
block.extract.name: Extract data
block.extract.desc: Saves text or a field value into a variable.
block.wait.name: Wait
block.wait.desc: Waits for time, text, or an element.
block.ifBlock.name: If...
block.ifBlock.desc: Checks a condition and can skip blocks when false.
block.repeatBlock.name: Repeat...
block.repeatBlock.desc: Runs the next N blocks multiple times.
block.popupWait.name: Wait for popup
block.popupWait.desc: Waits until an in-page modal or popup appears.
block.popupExtract.name: Extract popup data
block.popupExtract.desc: Saves a popup title or text into a variable.
block.popupClick.name: Popup button
block.popupClick.desc: Presses a button in a popup by text.
block.copy.name: Copy to clipboard
block.copy.desc: Copies text or a variable to the clipboard.
block.email.name: Compose email
block.email.desc: Creates an email draft from variables.
block.openEmail.name: Open email
block.openEmail.desc: Opens a mailto link; for long bodies it copies the body to the clipboard.
block.rowLoop.name: For each row...
block.rowLoop.desc: Simple table or list row-processing container.
block.mask.name: Mask data
block.mask.desc: Masks extracted data by characters or lines.
block.userPrompt.name: User message
block.userPrompt.desc: Shows a popup during the run and can optionally wait for feedback.
block.pageButton.name: Page button
block.pageButton.desc: Inserts a button into the current page and waits for a click.
block.transform.name: Transform data
block.transform.desc: Cleans text, changes case, or keeps only numbers/letters.
block.textSlice.name: Extract text part
block.textSlice.desc: Cuts text by start/end pattern, line, or character range.
block.regex.name: Regex search
block.regex.desc: Saves a match using a regular expression.
block.textSearch.name: Search text on page
block.textSearch.desc: Searches simple text on the page and also returns the match location.
block.errorSearch.name: Find error message
block.errorSearch.desc: Searches alert, validation, and error-message-like elements on the page.
block.fieldByLabel.name: Find field by label
block.fieldByLabel.desc: Finds a field on enterprise/SNOW-style interfaces by label or ARIA metadata.
block.setVar.name: Set variable
block.setVar.desc: Saves a fixed or interpolated value into a variable.
block.userInput.name: Ask for input
block.userInput.desc: Requests data from the user in an extension window.
block.userChoice.name: Ask for choice
block.userChoice.desc: Asks the user to choose from options and saves the choice into a variable.
block.tableExtract.name: Extract from table
block.tableExtract.desc: Extracts data from a table or list by row/column.
block.elementLoop.name: For each match...
block.elementLoop.desc: Runs nested blocks for multiple found elements.
block.waitUntil.name: Wait until...
block.waitUntil.desc: Waits until a condition is met, with a timeout.
block.waitLoad.name: Wait for loading
block.waitLoad.desc: After a click, URL change, or SPA update, waits until the page or panel has loaded.
block.scroll.name: Scroll
block.scroll.desc: Scrolls the page or a selected element into view.
block.keyPress.name: Press key
block.keyPress.desc: Presses Enter, Tab, Escape, Ctrl+A/C/V, or a custom key combination.
block.clipboardRead.name: Read clipboard
block.clipboardRead.desc: Saves clipboard text into a variable.
block.openUrl.name: Open URL
block.openUrl.desc: Opens a URL in the current tab, a new tab, or a new window.
block.pageInfo.name: Page information
block.pageInfo.desc: Saves the current URL, title, and domain into variables.
block.screenshot.name: Screenshot
block.screenshot.desc: Takes a screenshot of the visible page area.
block.tryBlock.name: Try / on error
block.tryBlock.desc: Error-handling container with success and error branches.
block.preflight.name: Check element
block.preflight.desc: Checks whether an element exists before running.
block.localSet.name: Local save
block.localSet.desc: Saves a value into local storage.
block.localGet.name: Local read
block.localGet.desc: Reads a value from local storage.
block.compare.name: Compare
block.compare.desc: Compares two values and saves the result into a variable.
block.math.name: Calculate
block.retryBlock.name: Retry...
block.popupWindowWait.name: Wait for new window
block.popupWindowWait.desc: Waits for a new browser window or tab by URL/title.
block.popupWindowExtract.name: Extract from new window
block.popupWindowExtract.desc: Gets data from a new window/tab page.
block.popupWindowClose.name: Close new window
block.iframeBlock.name: Inside iframe...
block.iframeBlock.desc: Handles nested block targets in an iframe context.
block.findElements.name: Find elements
block.findElements.desc: Finds multiple elements and saves count/text.
block.emailTemplate.name: Use email template
block.emailTemplate.desc: Loads a saved email template into a draft variable.
block.emailPreview.name: Email preview
block.emailPreview.desc: Shows an email, then asks whether to open, copy, or cancel it.
block.validateData.name: Validate data
block.validateData.desc: Validates a variable as email, non-empty, or containing a pattern.
block.comment.name: Comment
block.comment.desc: Does not run; only documents the workflow.
block.groupBlock.name: Group
block.callWorkflow.name: Run another automation
block.returnResult.name: Return result
block.stopRun.name: Stop
block.stopRun.desc: Stops the run with a specified message.
block.sound.name: Sound alert
block.sound.desc: Plays a short sound, including an uploaded custom sound.
block.pdfStart.name: Start PDF
block.pdfStart.desc: Creates a new PDF document during the run.
block.pdfText.name: Add PDF text
block.pdfText.desc: Adds text, a heading, or a note to the current PDF.
block.pdfTable.name: Add PDF table
block.pdfTable.desc: Adds a key-value or column-based table to the current PDF.
block.pdfScreenshot.name: Add PDF screenshot
block.pdfScreenshot.desc: Adds a screenshot to the current PDF.
block.pdfPageBreak.name: PDF page break
block.pdfPageBreak.desc: Inserts a page break into the current PDF.
block.pdfSave.name: Save / preview PDF
block.pdfSave.desc: Downloads or previews the assembled PDF.
block.docxStart.name: Start DOCX
block.docxStart.desc: Starts a new editable Word/DOCX report.
block.docxText.name: Add DOCX text
block.docxText.desc: Adds text or a heading to the current DOCX document.
block.docxTable.name: Add DOCX table
block.docxTable.desc: Adds a key-value table to the DOCX document.
block.docxScreenshot.name: Add DOCX screenshot / image
block.docxScreenshot.desc: Inserts a screenshot or image variable into the DOCX document.
block.docxPageBreak.name: DOCX page break
block.docxPageBreak.desc: Inserts a page break into the DOCX document.
block.docxSave.name: Save DOCX
block.scheduledTrigger.name: Scheduled start
block.scheduledTrigger.desc: Starts automatically at intervals or at a specified time.
block.systemNotify.name: System notification
block.systemNotify.desc: Sends a Chrome system notification with editable text.
side.pickInstruction: Click an element on the page.
publicLog.title: BlockFlow log
publicLog.downloadHint: Use the TXT button to download the run log.
publicLog.toggleTitle: Show step log on the page while running
triggerStartBadge.toggleTitle: Show watcher and click trigger start badge on the page
runtime.autoSubRunGate: Automatic/sub-workflow run: start conditions are not checked again.
runtime.manualTriggerFound: Manual Start block found: manual Run starts immediately.
runtime.clickTriggerFound: Click trigger found ({{count}}). Normal Run does not start because this trigger activates only when the selected element is clicked. Use Force run for testing.
runtime.noActiveTrigger: No active watcher/click trigger. The workflow action part starts.
runtime.checkingTriggers: Checking watcher triggers for manual run: {{count}} active trigger(s).
runtime.noTriggerMatched: Automation did not start: no watcher trigger condition is true. Use Force run to test action blocks.
runtime.iframeNotAccessible: Iframe is not accessible or is cross-origin.
background.clipboardWindowClosed: The clipboard reader window was closed.
background.noUsableSidebarTab: No usable web page tab for the sidebar.
background.noUsableActiveTab: No usable active web page tab. Open an http/https page and try again.
validation.maskMissingResult: Mask block: result variable name is missing.
validation.emailMissingDraft: Open email: draft variable name is missing.
validation.selectOptionEmpty: Dropdown option: option text is empty.
validation.scrollMissingTarget: Scroll to element: target element or dynamic target variable is missing.
validation.scrollUntilTextEmpty: Scroll until text: search text is empty.
validation.waitLoadMissingTarget: Wait for loading: target element is missing for element mode.
validation.preflightMissingTarget: Element check: target element is missing.
validation.pageButtonMissingTarget: Inserted page button: target element is missing for before/after placement.
validation.variableNotDefined: The {{name}} variable has not been created earlier.
workflow.importWarning: Imported or not-yet-verified automation. Use Dry-run and check elements before running.
workflow.mustKeepOne: At least one automation must remain.
workflow.chooseStarterFirst: Choose a starter block first: Start, Watcher trigger, Click trigger, or Scheduled start.
workflow.manualStarterExists: A manual start block already exists in this workflow.
workflow.conditionNeedsTrigger: Watcher conditions can only be placed under a Watcher trigger. Select the Watcher trigger, condition group, or an existing condition, or drag the condition under the trigger.
workflow.conditionOnlyUnderTrigger: Watcher condition can only be placed under a Watcher trigger.
workflow.onlyWatcherConditions: Only watcher condition blocks can be placed under Watcher trigger/condition group.
workflow.conditionOnlyTriggerOrGroup: Watcher condition can only be placed under a Watcher trigger or Condition group.
palette.needStarterOrTrigger: Choose a starter block first; for watcher conditions select a Watcher trigger or condition.
palette.addHint: Click to insert after the selected block, or drag to the desired position.
workspace.dropMain: Drop blocks here at the main level
workspace.nestedEmpty: Drag blocks here, or select the container and add a block from the left palette.
workspace.chooseStarter: Choose a starter on the left.
workspace.starterRequired: Start or Watcher trigger is required for the automation.
group.collapsedIconsTitle: Icons of blocks inside the group
group.collapsedLabel: GROUP COLLAPSED - child blocks are shown as icons
container.triggerConditions: WATCHER CONDITIONS - these decide whether the automation starts
container.conditionGroup: CONDITION GROUP - place additional watcher conditions here
container.childBlocks: Nested blocks affected by this block
sound.onlyAudio: Only audio files can be uploaded.
sound.maxSize: Custom sound should be short, maximum 1 MB.
record.startedLog: Recording started. Clicks, field changes and main keys on the target page will be recorded.
record.stoppedLog: Recording stopped. {{added}} block(s) created from {{events}} action(s).
popup.sidePanelApiUnavailable: The Chrome sidePanel API is not available in this browser. A recent Chrome version is required.
popup.sidebarErrorNormalPage: Sidebar error: Open a normal webpage first, then open the sidebar from there. It cannot run on Chrome internal pages.
builder.atLeastOneStarter: At least one starter block is required: Start or Watcher trigger.
builder.cannotMoveBlockIntoItself: A block cannot be dragged under itself.
builder.cannotMoveContainerBeforeChild: A container cannot be moved before its own child block.
miniExport.missingCalledWorkflow: Mini extension export cannot continue because a called automation is missing:
miniExport.readmeDescription: Mini Chrome extension generated from BlockFlow without the Builder UI.
miniExport.readmeInstall: Install: open chrome://extensions, enable Developer mode, choose Load unpacked, then select the extracted folder.
miniExport.readmeUsage: Usage: click the extension icon to run it. Watchers and schedules are registered automatically.
runtime.waitLoadTimeout: Wait for load: timeout, loading did not finish.
runtime.waitUntilTimeout: Wait until: timeout, condition was not met.
runtime.noEmailDraft: No email draft. Add a Compose email block before this block.
runtime.emailBodyCopiedBecauseMailtoTooL: The email body was too long for the mailto link, so it was copied to the clipboard. Paste it into the email that opens.
clipboard.title: BlockFlow clipboard
clipboard.heading: Read clipboard
clipboard.reading: BlockFlow is reading the clipboard text...
clipboard.failed: Could not read the clipboard automatically. Click Retry.
validation.missingStarter: Missing active start block. Add at least one: Start, active watcher trigger, click trigger, hotkey / text shortcut, or scheduled start.
validation.watcherNeedsCondition: Watcher trigger: at least one condition is required.
validation.clickTriggerMissingTarget: Click trigger: watched target element is missing.
validation.waitElementMissingTarget: Wait for element: target element is missing.
validation.ifMissingTarget: If block: target element is missing.
validation.ifEmptySearchText: If block: search text is empty.
validation.conditionTextEmpty: Text condition: watched text is empty.
validation.conditionUrlMissingValue: URL condition: checked value is missing.
validation.conditionChangeMissingTargetV: Value change condition: target value is missing.
validation.conditionChangeMissingSourceV: Value change condition: source value is missing.
validation.textSearchEmpty: Search text: search text is empty.
validation.fieldByLabelEmpty: Find field by label: label is empty.
validation.maskMissingSource: Mask block: source text or variable is missing.
runtime.pickerActive: BlockFlow element picker is active. Click an element. ESC: cancel.
runtime.userPromptOpenFailed: Could not open the user message window.
runtime.screenshotImageLoadFailed: Screenshot image could not be loaded for the PDF.
runtime.riskyClickConfirm: BlockFlow: this click looks risky: "{{label}}". Continue?
block.pageControlPanel.name: Embedded control panel
block.pageControlPanel.desc: Injects a customizable multi-button panel into the page. Each button runs an action group.
block.actionGroup.name: Action Group
block.actionGroup.desc: A named block group. It does not run automatically; a panel button or another caller starts it.
validation.actionGroupMissingKey: The action group requires an Action key.
validation.pageControlPanelMissingButton: The control panel needs at least one button row.
runtime.workflowAlreadyRunning: This automation is already running on this page.
runtime.actionGroupMissing: No action group found for key: {{action}}
block.textShortcut.name: Hotkey / text shortcut
block.textShortcut.desc: Replaces a typed abbreviation with a longer text in active fields, for example thx → Thank you in advance.
validation.textShortcutMissingShortcut: Hotkey / text shortcut: the abbreviation is missing.
validation.textShortcutEmptyReplacement: Hotkey / text shortcut: the replacement text is empty, so the abbreviation will be deleted.
